title: GT:Pain And Progression mod
description: A Mod Once Finished Will be like GT 6 But also has 2 custom dims and Ore Generation
body:
Welcome to GT:Pain&Progression Mod Once Finished will be a tech mod kinda like Greg Tech 6 but without magic i dont like magic but as this mod is not finished i think thats most of what i can think of to say about this mod

DISCLAMER: This Mod Is NOT Finished As of Right Now

Feature This mod will have once Finished 

.1 Will have 2 Custom dimensions 

.2 Will have a lot of custom blocks/items

.3 Will Have a Custom ore Generation maybe - This Is done plan to extend this tho for other things

.4 Will Have other types of energy like Greg tech 6 but dif

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

AS OF Version 1.4

Added 2 Biomes for both darkium and lightium

made a custom entity that only spawns in the darkium biome its kinda strong so be ready

also added a custom structure for the darkium biome

added tree suff like logs wood planks saplings ect.

finished a custom block i made for a friend

added world types

added loot tables for things that needed it

bug fixed a lot of these things



1.3 Stuff 

Old Features

There Is 2 New Resources Better Than Daimond That is Darkium and Lightium Lightium Being The Better Of the 2 Full Tool/Amor Sets Are There Aswell.

This Update I Also Added Custom Ore Gen For The nether End and overworld So that you can get the Things 

Basicly made Everything able To get in survival.

Also Made it So you need A Daimond pickaxe For Darkium And a Darkium Pickaxe For Lightium, Also if you mine The Ore In Other Dimensions you get more its Overworld Drops 1 Nether 2 End 3 per ore.

Also Added Custom Creative Tab Also If someone Has A good Logo or logo idea Text Me on Discord at darkerbladex

But Thats Mainly it I will Be Adding Custom Dimensions in The Next update Probably

What this mod will be Used For

.1 This mod is mainly made for a gregtech modpack im working on

.2 I uploaded this mod onto curse forge because idk i forgor

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
